scripts.tunnel:windows: ssh -N -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ExitOnForwardFailure=yes -o ServerAliveInterval=30 -o ServerAliveCountMax=3 -L 127.0.0.1:27018:127.0.0.1:27017 root@31.97.9.216
scripts.dev: npm run start:backend & npm run start:frontend
scripts.dev:windows: npm run clean:windows && start "Tunnel-DB" npm run tunnel:windows && timeout /t 5 && start "Backend" npm run start:backend && start "Frontend" npm run start:frontend
scripts.clean:windows: taskkill /F /IM node.exe /T /FI "STATUS eq RUNNING" 2>nul & taskkill /F /IM ssh.exe /T /FI "STATUS eq RUNNING" 2>nul & exit /b 0
